bot_response: Hello! Welcome to the Women Safety Analytics System. How can I help you?

user_message: How do I add an emergency contact?
bot_response: Go to the Profile section, select Emergency Contacts, and add the phone numbers of your trusted contacts.

user_message: How do I send an SOS alert?
bot_response: Press the SOS button to instantly send your live location and an emergency alert to your registered contacts.

user_message: What should I do if I feel unsafe?
bot_response: Move to a safe place if possible, call emergency services, and use the SOS feature to alert your emergency contacts.

user_message: Where is the nearest police station?
bot_response: Please enable your location so I can help you find the nearest police station.

user_message: How can I share my live location?
bot_response: Open the Live Location feature and tap Share to send your current location to your emergency contacts.

user_message: What is the women helpline number?
bot_response: The Women Helpline number is 181. For emergencies, you can also call 112.
Go to the Report Incident page, fill in the details, and submit your complaint.
Yes. Your personal information is stored securely and is used only for safety-related services.
You're welcome! Stay safe. We are always here to help.
